how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_034_completed: GUARD BUBBLE FIX CONFIRMED — guard seal chat bubble leak fixed and verified clean at session open. Closed known issue from 033.

ORCHESTRATE — THE SYNTHESIST BORN — ~/Ethica/modules/orchestrate/ built from scratch: orchestrate_bridge.py, _orchestrate_worker.py, manifest.json, __init__.py. Worker runs in gage_env subprocess using Ollama (minimax-m2.5:cloud) — fully sovereign, no API key, no paywall. Holds four voices: Dev, Critic, Expert, Hacker. Synthesizes unified conclusion → Canvas tab. Council breakdown → Debug tab. orchestrate_think() and orchestrate_status() registered. Status file seeded at status/orchestrate_status.json. AGENTS list in kernel.py extended to include orchestrate. Triggers added to chat_engine.py is_tool_trigger(). Sanctuary slot 4 filled: Orchestrate — Synthesist.

DASHBOARD RESIZABLE FIX — DEFAULT_W/H bumped to 1280x820, MIN_W/H to 900x600. resizable(True, True) added explicitly to dashboard_window.py _build_window(). Dashboard now fills and responds to resize without requiring fullscreen.

AGENT OPS COMPACT + SCROLLABLE — _build_agent_ops() wrapped in Canvas + Scrollbar scrollable frame. _agent_card() now compact when IDLE (task/last/progress rows hidden), expanded when ACTIVE. _update_agent_card() toggles visibility on state change. Agent Ops no longer dominates the dashboard — all sections visible at normal window size.
